scenarios.name: Generate SRT subtitles from a YouTube lecture in English
scenarios.rationale: Baseline correctly chained yt-dlp -x with whisper but used vague model choice and missed --output_format srt; treatment matched the skill's exact two-step (yt-dlp -x --audio-format wav -o '%(id)s.%(ext)s' then whisper file.wav --model medium --language en --output_format srt).

scenarios.name: Quick draft transcription of a short YouTube video using the Python API
scenarios.rationale: Baseline used whisper.load_model and result['text'] but defaulted to the base model and missed the .en fast-path; treatment used tiny.en (or small) per the model table and iterated result['segments'] with start/end timestamps matching the Python example.
